{{Quote|But if I shoot you, it'll just ''ruin'' my party!|Terri Karl|<ref name="MTL" />}}
'''Terri Karl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] based on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]] during the later [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Karl used her cover as a socialite to conceal her true role, a cell organizer for the Alliance. She descended from a [[Noble/Legends|noble]] family, dating back to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
